summary: Iteration 110 - Wallet UX Implementation Testing: All 8 features tested successfully. Navbar 'Wallet' entry visible on desktop and mobile. Route /wallet renders WalletPage with AppNavbar + breadcrumb. Route /settings/wallet correctly redirects to /wallet. Balance cards show 2 primary cards (DISPONIBLE + EN VERIFICATION) + secondary 'Total retire' row. Upcoming Unlocks section displays pending_hold distributions with dates. Transaction History shows bidirectional labels with green credit styling. Dashboard WalletWidget displays with intelligent alerts (amber alert for connect not started).

frontend_playwright: ✅ TEST 1: Desktop Navbar 'Wallet' link - Found navbar-wallet-link with href='/wallet'
✅ TEST 2: Mobile Navbar 'Wallet' link - Found mobile-nav-wallet with text 'Wallet'
✅ TEST 3: Route /wallet renders WalletPage - data-testid='wallet-page' found
✅ TEST 3: Route /wallet has AppNavbar - data-testid='app-navbar' found
✅ TEST 3: Route /wallet has breadcrumb 'Tableau de bord > Wallet'
✅ TEST 4: Route /settings/wallet redirects to /wallet - Verified redirect works
✅ TEST 5a: Balance card DISPONIBLE - data-testid='available-balance' shows '0,00 €'
✅ TEST 5b: Balance card EN VERIFICATION - data-testid='pending-balance' shows '20,00 €'
✅ TEST 5c: Secondary row 'Total retire' - data-testid='total-withdrawn-row' found
✅ TEST 5d: Total withdrawn value - data-testid='total-withdrawn' shows '0,00 €'
✅ TEST 6: Upcoming Unlocks section - data-testid='upcoming-unlocks' found with 3 pending distributions
✅ TEST 7: Transaction shows green credit styling (+20,00 € in emerald-600)
✅ TEST 8: WalletWidget alert - data-testid='wallet-widget-alert' shows amber alert 'Liez votre compte bancaire pour retirer vos fonds'
french_wording_verification: ✅ 'Fonds disponibles pour retrait' - Found on balance card
✅ 'Fonds en periode de verification' - Found on balance card
code_review: ✅ App.js: Route /settings/wallet redirects to /wallet with Navigate (line 100)
✅ AppNavbar.js: Mobile drawer has 'Wallet' link with data-testid='mobile-nav-wallet' (line 174-177)
✅ WalletPage.js: Standalone layout with AppNavbar + AppBreadcrumb (lines 963-969)
✅ WalletPage.js: BalanceCards component with 2 primary cards + secondary row (lines 57-117)
✅ WalletPage.js: UpcomingUnlocks component for pending_hold distributions (lines 717-761)
✅ WalletWidget.js: Shows when balance > 0 OR connect needed (lines 47-53)
✅ WalletWidget.js: Alert conditions for connect not started (amber), contestation (orange), failed payout (red) (lines 56-63)

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Wallet promoted to first-level page at /wallet with proper navbar integration
✅ /settings/wallet correctly redirects to /wallet using React Navigate
✅ Balance cards refactored: 2 primary cards (DISPONIBLE + EN VERIFICATION) + secondary 'Total retire' row
✅ Upcoming Unlocks section shows pending_hold distributions with unlock dates
✅ Transaction History uses bidirectional labels with green credit (+) styling
✅ French wording applied throughout (Disponible, En verification, Prochains deblocages, etc.)
✅ WalletWidget on dashboard shows intelligent alerts based on connect status

✅ All data-testid attributes present for testing: wallet-page, wallet-title, available-balance, pending-balance, total-withdrawn-row, total-withdrawn, upcoming-unlocks, transaction-history, wallet-widget, widget-available, widget-pending, wallet-widget-alert, navbar-wallet-link, mobile-nav-wallet
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data - user has available_balance=0, pending_balance=2000 (20€), stripe_connect_status='not_started', 3 pending_hold distributions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Wallet UX implementation complete. Key routes: /wallet (WalletPage), /settings/wallet (redirects to /wallet). Navbar entries: navbar-wallet-link (desktop), mobile-nav-wallet (mobile). WalletWidget on dashboard shows when balance > 0 OR connect needed, with intelligent alerts. Balance cards: available-balance, pending-balance, total-withdrawn-row, total-withdrawn. Sections: upcoming-unlocks, transaction-history. French wording used throughout.

routes./wallet: WalletPage with AppNavbar, breadcrumb 'Tableau de bord > Wallet'

balance_cards.secondary: Total retire row with data-testid='total-withdrawn-row' and 'total-withdrawn'

upcoming_unlocks.content: Shows pending_hold distributions with unlock dates

transaction_history.styling: Green credit (+) with text-emerald-600, debit (-) with text-slate-600

wallet_widget.alert: wallet-widget-alert with amber/orange/red based on condition
